description_long: This water gun features a sleek, elongated barrel and a two-tone color scheme of red and beige. The body is primarily constructed from molded plastic, with a smooth, glossy finish and subtle textural details. The handle is ergonomically shaped with vent-like grooves for improved grip and comfort, and the trigger is positioned within easy reach of the index finger. The top of the gun has a ribbed section, likely for aesthetic or grip purposes, and the side displays a few rectangular decorative elements. The nozzle at the front is simple and slightly tapered, designed for projecting water in a focused stream. The overall design is lightweight and playful, suitable for children or casual outdoor use in urban environments.
description: A red and beige plastic water gun with a long barrel, ergonomic grip, and simple nozzle, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and playful design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the water gun, the ergonomic grip with vent grooves, and the ribbed top section.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular nozzle opening and the slim profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the grip and decorative side elements visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded end of the handle and the back of the barrel, with the trigger area partially visible.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, small and rectangular, positioned within the handle area and colored red to match the grip. It appears smooth with no visible texturing.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle is a simple, single-opening type, circular in shape and slightly tapered, with no visible adjustable or decorative elements.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is integrated into the main body, forming the upper beige section of the gun. It is not detachable and has a smooth, solid appearance with no visible fill cap or transparency.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area features horizontal vent-like grooves for improved hold, extending along the lower part of the handle. The grip is entirely red and visually distinct from the beige upper body.
